name: crt_atexit_import_provider
description: atexit is provided by compiler/CRT glue and is not authored game production source.
known_limits: atexit is external compiler/CRT glue; there is no authored game function body to compare with VC COFF object bytes.
Final binary safety for this entry belongs to CRT/provider/import verification rather than per-function source codegen.
The native smoke verifies that the active CRT accepts an atexit registration through the provider-backed runtime path.
